properties.description: A terminal emulator window running on Fedora Linux, showing a command-line interface with the prompt '[aier @ fedora] ~' and the command 'sudo dnf update -y' being entered.
DNF (Dandified YUM) is the package manager used on Fedora Linux. The command 'sudo dnf update -y' is shown, which updates all system packages non-interactively.
Fedora is a Linux distribution shown as the host system in the terminal screenshot, identifiable by the hostname 'fedora' and the use of the DNF package manager.
